data.content:
The file is generated successfully (`obj/Debug/net8.0/Generated/GeneratedInfo.cs`) but never added to the `Compile` item group, so the compiler doesn't see it.

The fix is to add a `<Compile>` item for the generated file in the target:

arguments.new_str:
<!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>

    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target generates the file before `CoreCompile`, but it doesn't add the generated file to the `Compile` item group. The file is written to disk but MSBuild doesn't know to include it in compilation.

The fix is to add a `<Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />` item after writing the file in the target, so that the generated `.cs` file is included in the compilation.

arguments.new_str:
<!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>

    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

toolCalls.name: edit
toolCalls.args:
{"path": "/tmp/sv-8cb868fd2fa44114b5cbcf555e492d89/TestProject.csproj", "old_str": "    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />", "new_str": "    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>

    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />"}

toolArgs.new_str:
<!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>

    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

data.content:
**Problem:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target wrote `GeneratedInfo.cs` to disk but never told MSBuild to compile it. The generated file was invisible to the C# compiler.

**Fix:** Added a `<Compile Include="...">` item inside the target so the generated `.cs` file is included in compilation:

```xml
<ItemGroup>
  <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
</ItemGroup>
```
